title: In Black Market, LPG Cylinder Selling For Rs 6,500, Refill For Rs 4,000
description: NDTV sting operations have exposed black marketers selling cylinders at steep prices - with rates going up to Rs 6,500 for a gas cylinder and Rs 3,500-Rs 4,000 to refill a 14-kg cylinder, which earlier cost Rs 900-Rs 1,000.
